trigger_rule_cited.trigger_condition: Vendor will process personal data of EU/EEA data subjects on behalf of Lichen. DPA REQUIRED. GDPR Art. 28 DPA; Lichen Legal must execute Art. 28 DPA before any processing begins.

Vendor will have logical access to Lichen production systems or data repositories containing personal data. DPA REQUIRED. Art. 28 DPA; ISP-001 §12 compliance attestation; role-based access control and least-privilege acknowledgment.
